close_reason: Doc comments now list all possible errors including propagated Backend/Unavailable
description: All three Signer::new() doc comments say 'Returns InvalidUri if the backend's algorithm is not X.' However backend.algorithm()? propagates any SecretError variant — Backend, Unavailable, etc. HSM backends that return errors when the algorithm cache is cold (per the SigningBackend::algorithm contract) will surface as undocumented error variants to callers who read only the new() docs. The doc must say 'Returns Err if the backend's algorithm cannot be determined or does not match.'
title: new() docs omit non-InvalidUri errors from algorithm()
